# Ivan Kornienko - Cloud Solutions Architect & DevSecOps Consultant

> Senior Cloud Infrastructure Contractor delivering scalable, secure cloud platforms, Kubernetes GitOps, MLOps, and cost optimization.

## Core Capabilities
- Cloud Architecture (GCP, AWS, Azure)
- Kubernetes Orchestration & GitOps (ArgoCD)
- MLOps & AI Reliability
- Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, OpenTofu)

## Key Pages
- [Main Site](https://korn.systems/)
- [Raw Resume](/resume.md)
- [JSON Resume](/resume.json)

## Open Source / Portfolio
- [korn.systems Website Code](https://github.com/ivankorn/korn.systems): Development, automation, and open-sourcing of this personal portfolio and AI assistant integration.
- [terraform-spaceship-github-pages](https://registry.terraform.io/modules/ivankorn/github-pages/spaceship/latest): Authored and published Terraform module for automated GitHub Pages and Spaceship DNS configuration.
- [AI Agent Skills](https://github.com/antonbabenko): Contributed to Anton Babenko's `terraform-skill` and `code-intelligence` skills.
